# XCTestError.Code.timeoutWhileWaiting

**Case**

A code that represents a timeout the test encountered while waiting to fulfill expectations.

## Declaration

```swift
case timeoutWhileWaiting
```

## Error Codes

- **XCTestError.Code.failureWhileWaiting**: A code that represents a test failure the test encountered while waiting to fulfill expectations.
